caption: The video shows a close-up of a person's hands breaking apart what appears to be a block of compressed material, possibly a type of food or organic substance, into smaller pieces. The broken pieces are being added to a large metal bowl that already contains a significant amount of similar material. To the right of the bowl, there is a red cup filled with more of the same substance and a white plate with two larger chunks of it. The setting seems to be outdoors, as indicated by the natural light and wooden surface on which the items are placed. The logo "UCAR Center for Science Education" suggests that this activity might be part of an educational demonstration or experiment.
